text.content: Losing a pet is one of the most quietly devastating experiences in life. They don't just leave our homes. They leave a silence where their breathing used to be, an empty spot on the couch, a collar that still hangs by the door.

rich_text.plain_text: Losing a pet is one of the most quietly devastating experiences in life. They don't just leave our homes. They leave a silence where their breathing used to be, an empty spot on the couch, a collar that still hangs by the door.

text.content: When I lost my own cat years ago, I remember wishing I could hold onto something more than just photos. Something I could touch. Something that still felt like

text.content: That feeling is exactly why I started creating needle felted pet memorials. Handmade wool portraits that capture not just how your pet looked, but how they felt to love.

rich_text.plain_text: That feeling is exactly why I started creating needle felted pet memorials. Handmade wool portraits that capture not just how your pet looked, but how they felt to love.

text.content: Why a Needle Felted Memorial Is Different

rich_text.plain_text: Why a Needle Felted Memorial Is Different

text.content: There are many ways to remember a pet. Photo prints, engraved jewelry, paw print casts, painted portraits. Each has its own beauty. But needle felting offers something that most other memorials don't:

rich_text.plain_text: There are many ways to remember a pet. Photo prints, engraved jewelry, paw print casts, painted portraits. Each has its own beauty. But needle felting offers something that most other memorials don't:

text.content: texture and warmth

rich_text.plain_text: texture and warmth

text.content: A needle felted portrait is made entirely from wool, shaped one fiber at a time with a barbed needle. The result isn't flat or cold. It has depth, softness, and a lifelike quality that makes people reach out and touch it. It's the closest thing to feeling fur again.

rich_text.plain_text: A needle felted portrait is made entirely from wool, shaped one fiber at a time with a barbed needle. The result isn't flat or cold. It has depth, softness, and a lifelike quality that makes people reach out and touch it. It's the closest thing to feeling fur again.

text.content: What Makes It Meaningful

rich_text.plain_text: What Makes It Meaningful

text.content: Every strand is placed by hand

rich_text.plain_text: Every strand is placed by hand

text.content: I spend hours, sometimes days, on a single portrait. Layer by layer, I build up the colors of your pet's fur, the shape of their ears, the look in their eyes. There is no machine involved, no shortcut. Every piece is as unique as the pet it represents.

rich_text.plain_text: I spend hours, sometimes days, on a single portrait. Layer by layer, I build up the colors of your pet's fur, the shape of their ears, the look in their eyes. There is no machine involved, no shortcut. Every piece is as unique as the pet it represents.

text.content: You can include your pet's real fur

rich_text.plain_text: You can include your pet's real fur

text.content: This is the part that surprises most people. If you've kept some of your pet's fur, from brushing, grooming, or simply saved in a bag, I can blend it into the wool portrait. It becomes part of the piece, quite literally carrying a piece of your pet within it.

rich_text.plain_text: This is the part that surprises most people. If you've kept some of your pet's fur, from brushing, grooming, or simply saved in a bag, I can blend it into the wool portrait. It becomes part of the piece, quite literally carrying a piece of your pet within it.

text.content: Not everyone has saved fur, and that's completely okay. The portrait is equally meaningful without it. But for those who have, it adds a layer of connection that nothing else can.

rich_text.plain_text: Not everyone has saved fur, and that's completely okay. The portrait is equally meaningful without it. But for those who have, it adds a layer of connection that nothing else can.

text.content: It's art you can touch

rich_text.plain_text: It's art you can touch

text.content: Most art hangs on walls behind glass. A needle felted portrait invites you to run your fingers across it. The texture of the wool mimics the softness of real fur. Many of my clients tell me it's the first memorial that actually brought them comfort instead of just sadness.

rich_text.plain_text: Most art hangs on walls behind glass. A needle felted portrait invites you to run your fingers across it. The texture of the wool mimics the softness of real fur. Many of my clients tell me it's the first memorial that actually brought them comfort instead of just sadness.

text.content: If you're reading this and thinking of someone, or of your own loss, know that there's no wrong time to create a memorial. Grief doesn't follow a schedule, and neither does healing.

text.content: How the Process Works

rich_text.plain_text: How the Process Works

text.content: Creating a needle felted pet memorial is a collaborative process. You send me photos of your pet, we discuss the details together, I create the portrait over 2 to 4 weeks (with progress photos along the way), and then I ship the finished piece to you, framed and ready to display.

rich_text.plain_text: Creating a needle felted pet memorial is a collaborative process. You send me photos of your pet, we discuss the details together, I create the portrait over 2 to 4 weeks (with progress photos along the way), and then I ship the finished piece to you, framed and ready to display.
